first_paragraph: The **men's 100 metre butterfly** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships was held on July 29 with the heats and the semifinals and July 30 with the final.

The **men's 100 metre butterfly** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships was held on July 29 with the heats and the semifinals and July 30 with the final.
